ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "well_name" TEXT /* Name of the well */,
  "well_model" TEXT /* Type of well model */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the well */,
  "well_status" TEXT /* Current status of the well */,
  "well_type" TEXT /* Type of well */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator responsible for the well */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the well model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the well model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the well model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the well model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure of the well */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the well */,
  "drawdown" REAL /* Drawdown of the well */,
  "gas_saturation" REAL /* Gas saturation of the well */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_data_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pressure_data" (
  "pressure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pressure data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data the pressure data belongs to */,
  "conbpres" REAL /* CONBPRES value */,
  "conidx" INTEGER /* CONIDX value */,
  "coniopos" INTEGER /* CONIPOS value */,
  "conjpos" INTEGER /* CONJPOS value */,
  "conkpos" INTEGER /* CONKPOS value */,
  "pressure_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for pressure data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pressure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pressure_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES well_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well the alert belongs to */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance data point */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well the performance data belongs to */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date the performance data was collected */,
  "oil_rate" REAL /* Oil rate of the well */,
  "gas_rate" REAL /* Gas rate of the well */,
  "water_rate" REAL /* Water rate of the well */,
  "performance_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for performance data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_performance_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scada_data" (
  "scada_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SCADA data point */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well the SCADA data belongs to */,
  "scada_date" TEXT /* Date the SCADA data was collected */,
  "scada_value" REAL /* SCADA value */,
  "scada_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for SCADA data */,
  "scada_source" TEXT /* Source of the SCADA data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scada_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scada_data_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "operator_email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "operator_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)
